bird.name: 蓝头蜂鸟
bird.summary: 蓝头蜂鸟（学名：Riccordia bicolor），是雨燕目蜂鸟科的一种鸟类，该物种原属于单独的蓝头蜂鸟属（学名：Cyanophaia）。 蓝头蜂鸟体重约4.5克，翼长约59.8毫米，嘴峰长约19.3毫米，喙宽度约2.1毫米，喙厚度约1.7毫米，跗蹠长约4.7毫米，尾长约37…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: 蓝头蜂鸟
relations.evidence: It inhabits undisturbed forests and secondary forest along rivers. It is sedentary, meaning that it does not migrate at all

relations.subject: 蓝头蜂鸟
relations.evidence: BirdLife International, which provides the IUCN conservation status for birds, classifies the blue-headed hummingbird as near-threatened due to climate change and the resulting severe weather. The blue-headed hummingbird is common in its habitat, albeit sporadically distributed; estimates for population density have varied greatly
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
